# 主动回忆

主动回忆 is a core concept in education and knowledge management. Closely related to [[spaced-repetition]], [[anki]], [[make-it-stick]]. These connections reflect important links in the knowledge network. Understanding these relationships helps build a comprehensive knowledge graph.
